violations.description: Conditional assertion branch changes expected contract path by runtime durability state.
violations.suggestion: Extract a helper that validates both durability modes from a single expected-shape table.

violations.description: Duplicate conditional branch appears in a second scenario, increasing branching surface.
violations.suggestion: Share one assertion helper for side-effect durability to remove duplicate branch logic.

recommendations: Keep deterministic token/provider-event generation as the default strategy for all new scenarios
Consolidate durability branch assertions into one helper to reduce duplicated conditional flows
Retain explicit timeline ordering checks using occurredAtUtc + eventId tie-break
summary: Determinism is strong with no hard waits, random generators, or timing sleeps; only minor duplicated conditional assertion branches were found.
